source_pr.title: *: support JSON format output in explain statement
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->
Support JSON format output of explain result
Issue Number: ref #39261 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No explicit flaky failure signature is described in the PR or reflected in the patch; this PR adds support for JSON-format `EXPLAIN` output and related tests.
failure_signature: No explicit flaky failure signature in patch (feature/tests change for JSON EXPLAIN output).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR implements JSON-format output for `EXPLAIN` and adds tests for the new behavior. The patch does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent failure, so keep this case as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: Add JSON-format `EXPLAIN` output support and corresponding parser/executor/planner changes plus tests.

evidence: evidence: "with top10 as ( select * from t1 order by id desc limit 10 ) select * from top10 where id in (1,2)", (executor/explain_test.go)

files: executor/explain_test.go, executor/explainfor_test.go, parser/misc.go, parser/parser.go, parser/parser.y, parser/parser_test.go, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/main_test.go, planner/core/plan_test.go, planner/core/testdata/json_plan_suite_in.json, planner/core/testdata/json_plan_suite_out.json, types/explain_format.go
